title: Citrusy Portuguese Chicken Stir-Fry
description: This Citrusy Portuguese Chicken Stir-Fry is a fluffy weeknight dish featuring chicken thighs marinated in a citrusy blend and served with dumplings for an easy whole30-friendly meal.
instructions: Mix lemon juice, orange juice, ginger, garlic, and sesame oil in a bowl.
Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the marinade over the chicken, then bake for about 25 minutes or until fully cooked (internal temperature reaches 165°F).
While the chicken is baking, prepare the dumplings according to package instructions.
In a wok or large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Remove chicken from wok and set aside. In the same pan, add more sesame oil if needed. Stir-fry dumplings in hot pan for a few minutes or until they puff up slightly.
Return cooked chicken to the skillet with the dumplings and serve warm.
